'''Corellidyne Visual''',<ref name="EGWT" /> sometimes styled as '''Correlidyne Visuals''',<ref name="NEGWT">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> produced [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] imaging devices including highly advanced [[Holographic Projector Doubler Suit]]s<ref name="GG10" /> and the [[CQ-3.9x holographic image disguiser]].<ref name="EGWT" />
